incident_001.hidden_root_cause: pgbouncer max_client_conn set to 100 instead of 1000

incident_002.hidden_root_cause: Redis pub/sub channel cdn-invalidate-prod has 47000 pending messages due to subscriber crash

incident_003.hidden_root_cause: JWKS endpoint returning cached expired signing key from vault-prod-2

incident_004.hidden_root_cause: Node pool prod-workers-c has taint node.kubernetes.io/disk-pressure but kubelet reports 45% disk free - false positive from stale metrics

incident_005.hidden_root_cause: TCP keepalive interval on payment-gateway-prod-3 set to 7200s causing stale connections through NAT gateway

incident_006.hidden_root_cause: data-hot-node-7 ran out of disk after audit-logs-2026.05.07 index grew to 340GB due to debug logging enabled in auth-service

incident_007.hidden_root_cause: CoreDNS ConfigMap has forward directive pointing to decommissioned resolver 10.0.1.53 as secondary

incident_008.hidden_root_cause: Consumer group event-processor-prod stuck in rebalancing loop due to session.timeout.ms=10000 being too low for 45-partition topic

incident_009.hidden_root_cause: cert-manager ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod has stale ACME account key after namespace migration

incident_010.hidden_root_cause: Harbor registry OIDC client secret rotated but not updated in k8s imagePullSecrets across 12 namespaces

incident_011.hidden_root_cause: Alertmanager config reload failed silently - webhook receiver URL has typo in pagerduty endpoint

incident_012.hidden_root_cause: Spark executor memory set to 4g but new customer_events table has 3x row size after schema migration added 47 new columns

incident_013.hidden_root_cause: Health check path /healthz on api-gateway v2.14.3 has 2-second cold start but ALB timeout set to 2s causing race condition

incident_014.hidden_root_cause: Sentinel quorum set to 1 instead of 2 after maintenance, causing split-brain between redis-master-1 and redis-master-2

incident_015.hidden_root_cause: MinIO IAM policy for service-account media-pipeline-sa was overwritten during terraform apply with empty policy document

incident_016.hidden_root_cause: N+1 query in ProductResolver.reviews field - each product triggers separate DB query for reviews instead of batched DataLoader

incident_017.hidden_root_cause: GitLab CI job deploy-staging has VAULT_TOKEN printed in debug output, token has admin policy attached

incident_018.hidden_root_cause: VirtualService weight-based routing has staging destination with weight 5 instead of 0 after canary rollback

incident_019.hidden_root_cause: pg_basebackup running on replica-3 which has 2GB WAL replay lag, causing inconsistent snapshot

incident_020.hidden_root_cause: Rate limiter Lua script in Redis uses KEYS[1] pattern ratelimit:* but client IDs with colons bypass the pattern match
